name: Ellie's Machaca
recipeInstructions:
4 lb Shredded Beef
1 lb Chorizo
2 cups Diced Green Chilis
2 Diced Onions
12 Eggs
1 cup Milk
1 lb Mushrooms, sliced
1 Bell Pepper, sliced thin
2 cups Sliced Black Olives
2 lbs Cheese
24 Flour Tortillas, large
Salt to Taste
Pepper to Taste
Cumin to Taste
1. Mix all ingredients except eggs, milk, cheese, and tortillas together.
2. Heat to simmering and simmer about 30 minutes.
3. Mix eggs and milk together and beat lightly.
4. Combine eggs with the simmering meat mix.
5. Scramble until eggs are done.
6. Heat tortillas; fill with meat mixture and grated cheese.
7. Enjoy!!!
